---
title: "SimBioSe-W Shinylive"
format:
  dashboard:
    orientation: columns
filters:
  - shinylive
shinylive:
  shinylive-repo: "https://posit-dev.github.io/shinylive/r/repo/"   
---

<!---- Intitialisation of the WebR/shinylive filter -------------------------/-->
<!---- Run this once before compiling the app ----------------------------------
library(reticulate)
reticulate::py_config()$python
reticulate::py_run_string("import shinylive; print('Erfolg! shinylive Version:', shinylive.__version__)")
system("quarto add quarto-ext/shinylive --no-prompt")
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------/-->




<!---------------------------------------------------------------------------/-->
# Exponential Growth

## Description

::: {.panel-tabset width="38%"}

### Example

{{< include _exponential_example.qmd >}}

### The Model

{{< include _exponential_description.qmd >}}

### Tasks

{{< include _exponential_tasks.qmd >}}

### Hints

{{< include _exponential_hints.qmd >}}

### Read More

{{< include _exponential_more.qmd >}}

:::

## Column {width="60%"}

{{< include _exponential_code.qmd >}}


<!---------------------------------------------------------------------------/-->
# Limited Growth

## Description

::: {.panel-tabset width="38%"}

### Example

{{< include _logistic_example.qmd >}}

### The Model

{{< include _logistic_description.qmd >}}

### Tasks

{{< include _logistic_tasks.qmd >}}

### Hints

{{< include _logistic_hints.qmd >}}

### Read More

{{< include _logistic_more.qmd >}}

:::

## Column {width="60%"}

{{< include _logist_code.qmd >}}


<!---------------------------------------------------------------------------/-->

# Nutrient Limited Growth

## Description

::: {.panel-tabset width="38%"}

### Example

{{< include _resource_example.qmd >}}

### The Model

{{< include _resource_description.qmd >}}

### Tasks

{{< include _resource_tasks.qmd >}}

### Hints

{{< include _resource_hints.qmd >}}

### Read More

{{< include _resource_more.qmd >}}

:::

## Column {width="60%"}

{{< include _resource_code.qmd >}}


<!---------------------------------------------------------------------------/-->
## Column {width="40%"}

# Predator-Prey Model

## Description

::: {.panel-tabset width="38%"}

### Example

{{< include _lv_example.qmd >}}

### The Model

{{< include _lv_description.qmd >}}

### Tasks

{{< include _lv_tasks.qmd >}}

### Hints

{{< include _lv_hints.qmd >}}

### Read More

{{< include _lv_more.qmd >}}

:::

## Column {width="60%"}

{{< include _lv_code_download.qmd >}}
